form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Dallas Miki, a rival who she faces again; when 55 metres seventh at this track over 2190m in a NR 57 to 64 race on March 27. Will need some luck to figure.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Dallas Miki, a rival who she faces again; when 55 metres seventh at this track over 2190m in a NR 57 to 64 race on March 27. Will need some luck to figure.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 55.6m.
Held up for clear running in the home straight on the final occasion.
Broke gait whilst under pressure passing the 100m.
Weakened over the final stages to finish in 8th position, beaten 52.8m.
Broke racing towards the back straight on the final occasion.
Pulled hard during the middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1790m at this track was 4th-4.8 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Hooklineandsinker (2:11.00) in NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $2.50. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Sr5) over 2100m at Charlton beaten 15 m by Heatseeker (2:29.70) in NR 50 to 55 on March 15 at $8. Rates highly. Rates highly and looks hard to beat on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover from the 1100m mark.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 9 m (Sr1) at this track (2:44.50) beating Nocomment in MAIDEN on March 27 at $21 at the bell was 2nd-7.4. Two runs back 3rd (Sr2) over 1790m at this track was 5th-12.4 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Bite The Ear Mike (2:13.40) in MAIDEN on March 20 at $81. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; posted a big 4.5 m win (Sr1) at this track (2:12.40) beating Indianas Son in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $10 at the bell was 3rd-4.4. Two runs back 7th (Sr3) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 8th-14.6 beaten 13 m by Diamond Krusher (2:12.10) in NR up to 50 on March 20 at $7.50. Not keen against this field.

Eased out of the race leaving the 800m mark and did not complete the race.
Hung out throughout the score up.

Leading contender on best form.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Our Art Work at Charlton over 1609m in a NR up to 59 on March 15 at $6.50. Can be right in the thick of things.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Birchip over 2150m NR up to 55 on March 8. Last time out surrendered the lead and finished 5th (Fr1) over 2240m after showing early speed at Melton, at the bell was 4th-5.11 beaten 6 m by Alwaysbealady (2:42.20) in NR 62 to 71 on March 28 at $16. Watch for a spike in form.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; broke in score up and was out of position at the start 8th (Fr3) over 1750m at Swan Hill was 9th-17 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Ideal Bandit (2:04.30) in NR 56 to 64 on March 31 at $4.20. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.2 m (Sr3) at this track (2:38.50) beating Midnight Pirate in NR 57 to 64 on March 27 at $3.90 at the bell was leading 4.4. Strong claims.
